features.name: Channel Divinity
features.description: At each level, you gain additional Channel Divinity options to choose from when using this feature.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description: You know the thaumaturgy cantrip. When you reach 3rd level, you can cast the cure wounds spell once with this trait and regain the ability to do so when you finish a long rest.

features.name: Channel Divinity
features.description: A cleric can channel divine energy to create miraculous effects

features.name: Greater Restoration
features.description: Can cast the greater restoration spell without a material component

features.name: Domain Power (Choose at 15th Level, from available options)
Spellcasting
features.description: At 20th level, you can cast one additional domain spell per day. You regain all expended spell slots when you finish a long rest.
